seoTitle: Stewarton vs Stockhaven — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Stewarton and Stockhaven. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Stewarton and Stockhaven.
heading: Stewarton vs Stockhaven — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Stewarton, Queensland and Stockhaven, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Stewarton and Stockhaven have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Stewarton or Stockhaven safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Stewarton has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Stockhaven scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Stewarton scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Stockhaven scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Stewarton or Stockhaven?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Stewarton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
